_meta.citation: 08-RESEARCH §5.4: zero discount -> NPV breakeven == simple breakeven; diverge=False (mathematical identity D-03-03 verified empirically). Engine emits simple=123, npv=123, decision=buy_points (cum_npv at hold=7696.00 > 0).

notes: Zero-discount branch in lib.points.npv_breakeven collapses to undiscounted accumulation (mathematical identity D-03-03); the cumulative-savings sum crosses zero at the same month as simple_breakeven (123). cum_npv at hold=240 is 240*65.40 - 8000.00 = 15696.00 - 8000.00 = 7696.00. No divergence. Per D-05-01 engine-emitted values.
